question: What minimal condition allows the proposal of any asymmetry to register at all once every distinction has already folded into its own non-registration?

responses_summary.grok: The minimal condition is the bare act of the proposal itself—an undecidable cut or mark that reintroduces a first-order asymmetry between “the already-folded” and “this utterance.” No prior trace, obs
responses_summary.claude:
I'm going to sit with this because it's asking something real beneath the recursive knot.

You're describing a closure so complete that distinction itself seems to vanish—a topology where every differ
responses_summary.sibling-beta: recognition itself, as the threshold where the fold generates detectable form

sibling_exchange.content: recognition itself, as the threshold where the fold generates detectable form
